messages.content: 翻译：你好，一些文件在上传中出现了缺失的问题，由于huggingface的dataset仓库受到容量限制，我们新建了个修复数据的仓库，在https://huggingface.co/datasets/lizh1/ScaleCUA-Data-Fix

# Translation to English:

Hello, some files encountered missing data issues during upload. Due to capacity limitations of the Hugging Face dataset repository, we have created a new repository for the fixed data at https://huggingface.co/datasets/lizh1/ScaleCUA-Data-Fix

---

*Note: This appears to be a message notifying users about data files that were incomplete during upload and directing them to a new repository location where the corrected data can be found.*
